channel.title: Microsoft Entra on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft Entra on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Microsoft Entra server principals on Azure SQL Database
item.description:
Microsoft Entra server principals (logins) for Azure SQL Database are now generally available. You can now create logins with CREATE LOGIN ... FROM EXTERNAL PROVIDER in the virtual master database, aligning Microsoft Entra identities with SQL logins.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Entra-only identities with Azure Files
item.description:
Azure Files now supports generally available Entra-only identities for SMB access. This lets organizations use cloud-native identities to access file shares without requiring Active Directory or hybrid identity infrastructure.

  • Source: Azure Updates
